prompt: Highlight regions above a certain brightness threshold with a red hue.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Apply a prominent red hue to all regions within image 1 that exceed a high brightness threshold. Use the yellow and red areas in image 2 as the precise spatial and intensity guide for which regions to color red. The resulting image should be photorealistic, with the brightest parts of the galaxy cluster and individual stars appearing distinctly red.
objects: red-hued bright regions of the galaxy cluster
